ddls:
CREATE TABLE "surveys" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey */,
  "survey_name" TEXT /* Name of the survey */,
  "survey_description" TEXT /* Description of the survey, including its purpose and scope */,
  "survey_date" TEXT /* Date when the survey was conducted */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Number of participants in the survey */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the survey */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the survey was created */,
  "published_date" TEXT /* Date when the survey was published */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the survey (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_surveys_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey the question belongs to */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the question asked */,
  "question_category" TEXT /* Category of the question (e.g., friendships, online experiences) */,
  "question_type" TEXT /* Type of question (e.g., multiple choice, Likert scale) */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the question (e.g., integer, string) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question the response belongs to */,
  "response_text" TEXT /* Text of the response */,
  "response_value" TEXT /* Value of the response (e.g., percentage, count) */,
  "response_type" TEXT /* Type of response (e.g., percentage, count) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "child_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the group (e.g., No SEN, SEN) */,
  "group_description" TEXT /* Description of the group */,
  "group_code" TEXT /* Code for the group (e.g., SEN1, SEN2) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "response_details" (
  "response_detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response detail */,
  "response_id" INTEGER /* ID of the response the detail belongs to */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the child group */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of children in the group who are happy with the aspect */,
  "relative_risk" REAL /* Relative risk of negative outcomes for the group */,
  "effect_size" TEXT /* Effect size of the difference between groups */,
  "statistical_significance" TEXT /* Statistical significance of the difference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_response_details_response_id FOREIGN KEY ("response_id") REFERENCES responses ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_response_details_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES child_groups ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the survey */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the survey was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interventions" (
  "intervention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each intervention */,
  "intervention_name" TEXT /* Name of the intervention */,
  "intervention_description" TEXT /* Description of the intervention, including its objectives and methods */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the intervention */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the intervention */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the intervention */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the intervention was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the intervention (e.g., planned, ongoing, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("intervention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interventions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "intervention_impact" (
  "impact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each impact record */,
  "intervention_id" INTEGER /* ID of the intervention */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question related to the intervention */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the child group */,
  "pre_intervention_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of children happy with the aspect before the intervention */,
  "post_intervention_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of children happy with the aspect after the intervention */,
  "change_percentage" REAL /* Change in percentage after the intervention */,
  "statistical_significance" TEXT /* Statistical significance of the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("impact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_intervention_impact_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_intervention_impact_intervention_id FOREIGN KEY ("intervention_id") REFERENCES interventions ("intervention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_intervention_impact_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES child_groups ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata record */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey the metadata belongs to */,
  "context" TEXT /* Context in which the survey was conducted */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used for the survey */,
  "sample_characteristics" TEXT /* Characteristics of the sample population */,
  "limitations" TEXT /* Limitations of the survey */,
  "funding_sources" TEXT /* Sources of funding for the survey */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user with permission */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey the user has permission for */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the request */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date when the request was made */,
  "request_description" TEXT /* Description of the data requested */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_requests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each provider */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the provider */,
  "provider_description" TEXT /* Description of the provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sharing_agreements" (
  "agreement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agreement */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the provider organization */,
  "recipient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recipient organization */,
  "agreement_date" TEXT /* Date when the agreement was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agreement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the participant is part of */,
  "participant_name" TEXT /* Name of the participant */,
  "participant_age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_participants_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES study_outcomes ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outcome */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the outcome belongs to */,
  "outcome_name" TEXT /* Name of the outcome */,
  "outcome_description" TEXT /* Description of the outcome */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id")
)
